## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt -p symc --all` applied
- [ ] `cargo clippy -p symc --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] If behavior change: updated docs / changelog / conformance as needed
- [ ] If language/semantic change: discussed in issue or RFC first (when applicable)
